package rulecoverage

func NegativeMultipleShouldbindCallsSameHandler() string {
    ruleID := "multiple_shouldbind_calls_same_handler"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Gin handlers that bind the request body multiple times in one function."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
